## Changelog
* 331707576442bf01927cdedf88849d535dab4e63 ci: gofmt, vet, build, test
* 891f19328a5dc3c14d811178052c9b47f266547e sidecar: portable torch requirement (the +cpu pin was deploy-specific; broke macOS setup)
* 2ed177dac218b5f8cc66d42b836258ee6b977f30 P0.7: hook-output cap options doc
* 6f8156e24f351c4045fcb35ae48c858458683958 maintainer phase 0: whittle stats (local savings loop), GUARANTEES.md, goreleaser+brew config, contributing/issue templates, execution plan
* fa6085136ed05100e669a90006147149146c078e hook: docs-verified PostToolUse contract (updatedToolOutput, tool_output stdin, 10k output cap fail-open)
* a6120c287588ebc9206ac9cfeb8d92df5e5a8095 one-command install: whittle setup/status/stop/cleanup + embedded sidecar + launchd + Claude Code hook
* 921029228daa0132aea2643a6c68bc79f91db40d positioning: precise claims — read-time proxies (verified), not 'gateways'; retrieval-loop framing
* a52facadd5938b1b99147403c37524380c66ebbd positioning: write-time-vs-read-time thesis, benchmarks, headroom attribution (NOTICE)
* a5069a2f5f6c6413ab88ac4a28093d701105308c whittle 0.1.0: content-aware, fail-open compression for agent tool outputs
